name: ai-tools-mcp
description: Hosted-API research and session-management MCP server. Exposes Perplexity Sonar (quick) and Sonar Pro (deep) research, Perplexity Agent API Search-as-Code (bulk, sandboxed, sync or background-polled), Google Gemini Deep Research (async, long-form), and local conversation-session persistence. Includes slash commands, routing skills, and a session-start preflight hook.
